title: Rediscovering Home Cooking
sentences: Growing up, I took my grandmother's cooking completely for granted.
It was only after moving abroad that I began to appreciate it fully.
Restaurants nearby served food that was pleasant but somehow lacked character.
Determined to recreate those flavours, I started experimenting in my own kitchen.
Although my early attempts were disappointing, I gradually improved through practice.
Cooking traditional dishes has become a way of staying connected to home.
Some ingredients are difficult to find, so I often have to improvise.
Despite the challenges, the process has taught me a great deal of patience.
Sharing these meals with friends has turned into a small weekly tradition.
Looking back, I wish I had learned these recipes much sooner.
